nation: Mississaugas of the Credit First Nation
one_time_description: Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation - Rapid Housing Initiative one-time grant of $6,600,000
economic_notes: Nation owns 100% of 8392692 Canada Inc., 100% of Nanticoke Corporation, 100% of MCBC, and 99.99% of MCB-LP for investing in and operating on-reserve and off-reserve business ventures. New Credit Variety and Gas Bar fully consolidated. Toronto Purchase Trust settlement of $144,386,724 established in 2010 continues to generate annual income distributions.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 statements signed October 24, 2023 (18 months after year end). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 8392692 Canada Inc., MCBC, MCB-LP, and Nanticoke Corporation. New Credit Variety and Gas Bar fully consolidated as subsidiary. Toronto Purchase Trust ($144M settlement) is a separate legal entity excluded from consolidation but generates significant annual income distributions (~$16.2M in 2022). CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative $6.6M is a significant one-time item fully deferred at year end. Health and social services expenses shown together as one program line; social services not separately broken out. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
